name: Lower Body Blast
description: Strengthen legs and glutes with compound movements

exercises.name: Bodyweight Squat
instructions: Stand with feet shoulder-width apart
Lower your body by bending knees and hips
Keep chest up and core engaged
Push through heels to return to standing
exercises.formTip: Push through your heels, knees track over toes

exercises.name: Forward Lunge
instructions: Stand tall with feet together
Step forward with one leg
Lower back knee toward the floor
Push off front foot to return to standing
exercises.formTip: Step forward, drop back knee to just above floor

exercises.name: Glute Bridge
instructions: Lie on your back with knees bent and feet flat
Push hips up toward the ceiling
Squeeze glutes hard at the top
Lower back down slowly with control
exercises.formTip: Squeeze glutes hard at the top, pause 1 second

exercises.name: Romanian Deadlift
instructions: Stand holding dumbbells in front of thighs
Hinge at hips pushing them backward
Lower weights along your legs feeling the stretch
Drive hips forward to return to standing
exercises.formTip: Hinge at hips, keep back straight

exercises.name: Standing Calf Raise
instructions: Stand with feet hip-width apart near a wall for balance
Rise up onto the balls of your feet
Hold at the top briefly squeezing calves
Lower back down slowly
exercises.formTip: Rise up on toes, hold at the top briefly

exercises.name: Jump Squat
instructions: Stand with feet shoulder-width apart
Lower into a squat position
Explode upward jumping as high as possible
Land softly and immediately lower into next rep
exercises.formTip: Maintain good posture, step with control
